policy.globalSkillPolicy: Do not edit global skills or create global symlinks for this project phase.
policy.note: 2026-07-03 H5 AR retirement (docs/migration/2026-07-03-h5-retirement.md): all deprecated/rejected/archive-candidate/evidence-only H5-AR .mind + magnet + nanpu items were physically deleted with the H5 AR route, so their manifest records are removed. The Jinxianmen Guo Zhiqi active-candidate assets were migrated from public/ar/spots/jinxianmen/libai/ into the mini-program package (wechat-jinxianmen/miniprogram/assets/ar/libai/) and their paths[] updated below. Historical audit trace of the delisted items lives in the retirement note.

items.reason: Primary candidate for the Jinxianmen Guo Zhiqi character-presence AR direction. Migrated into the mini-program package during the 2026-07-03 H5 AR retirement.
